    Consumption - Class in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model
    Represents consumption data in the Tibber API.
    Consumption() - Constructor for class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.Consumption
     
    ConsumptionQuery - Class in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.query
    Query for retrieving consumption data from the Tibber API.

    Creates a new consumption query with the specified Tibber API client.

    Retrieves annual consumption data for the specified home and time period.

    Returns the end time of the consumption period.

    getTodayPrices(String) - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.query.PriceQuery
    Retrieves the electricity prices for today for the specified home.

    getTomorrowPrices(String) - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.query.PriceQuery
    Retrieves the electricity prices for tomorrow for the specified home.

    Returns the total electricity price including energy, tax, and grid rent.
    getUnitPrice() - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.Consumption
    Returns the unit price of electricity during the consumption period.
    getUnitPrice() - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.Production
    Returns the unit price of electricity during the production period.
    getUnitPriceVAT() - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.Consumption
    Returns the VAT component of the unit price.
    getUnitPriceVAT() - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.Production
    Returns the VAT component of the unit price.

    Returns the unique identifier for the user.
    getVatType() - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.Home.MeteringPointData

    Returns the voltage of phase 1 in volts.
    getVoltagePhase2() - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.LiveMeasurement
    Returns the voltage of phase 2 in volts.
    getVoltagePhase3() - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.LiveMeasurement
    Returns the voltage of phase 3 in volts.

    H

    Home - Class in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model
    Represents a home in the Tibber API.
    Home() - Constructor for class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.Home
     
    Home.Address - Class in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model
    Represents an address in the Tibber API.
    Home.Features - Class in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model
    Represents features available for a home in the Tibber API.
    Home.MeteringPointData - Class in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model
    Represents metering point data in the Tibber API.
    Home.PriceInfo - Class in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model
    Represents price information in the Tibber API.
    Home.Subscription - Class in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model
    Represents a subscription in the Tibber API.

    Returns whether the subscription is currently connected.

    L

    LiveMeasurement - Class in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model
    Represents real-time measurement data from the Tibber API.
    LiveMeasurement() - Constructor for class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.LiveMeasurement
     
    LiveMeasurementSubscription - Class in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.subscription
    Subscription for receiving real-time measurement data from the Tibber API.
    LiveMeasurementSubscription(String, String, SubscriptionHandler) - Constructor for class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.subscription.LiveMeasurementSubscription
    Creates a new live measurement subscription for the specified home.
    LiveMeasurementSubscription(String, String, SubscriptionHandler, OkHttpClient) - Constructor for class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.subscription.LiveMeasurementSubscription
    Creates a new live measurement subscription with a custom HTTP client.

    O

    onConnected() - Method in interface com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.subscription.SubscriptionHandler
    Called when the subscription is connected.
    onDisconnected(String) - Method in interface com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.subscription.SubscriptionHandler
    Called when the subscription is disconnected.
    onError(Throwable) - Method in interface com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.subscription.SubscriptionHandler
    Called when an error occurs during the subscription.
    onMeasurement(LiveMeasurement) - Method in interface com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.subscription.SubscriptionHandler
    Called when a new measurement is received.

    Sets the voltage of phase 2 in volts.
    setVoltagePhase3(Double) - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.LiveMeasurement
    Sets the voltage of phase 3 in volts.
    start() - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.subscription.LiveMeasurementSubscription
    Starts the subscription to real-time measurement data.
    stop() - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.subscription.LiveMeasurementSubscription
    Stops the subscription to real-time measurement data.
    subscribeToLiveMeasurements(String, SubscriptionHandler) - Method in class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.client.TibberApiClient
    Creates a subscription for real-time measurement data for the specified home.
    Subscription() - Constructor for class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.Home.Subscription
     
    SubscriptionHandler - Interface in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.subscription
    Interface for handling subscription events from the Tibber API.

    T

    TibberApiClient - Class in com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.client
    Client for interacting with the Tibber GraphQL API.
    TibberApiClient(String) - Constructor for class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.client.TibberApiClient
    Creates a new Tibber API client with the specified access token.
    TibberApiClient(String, OkHttpClient) - Constructor for class com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.client.TibberApiClient
    Creates a new Tibber API client with the specified access token and HTTP client.

    Represents a Tibber user.
